name: @pyreon/example-native-analytics
description: PRIVATE / EXPERIMENTAL — the canonical multiplatform analytical-app proof. A single source compiles to web + iOS + Android: a heavy data table from canonical primitives, reduce-based column totals, and a chart hosted in a native WebView via the escape-hatch primitives (web-only-rich viz inside a native shell).

scripts.build: bun run build:swift && bun run build:kotlin
scripts.lint: echo '[native-analytics] no TS lint surface; skipping'
scripts.test: echo '[native-analytics] no test surface; PMTC emit covered by @pyreon/native-compiler tests'
scripts.typecheck: echo '[native-analytics] @ts-nocheck on source; PMTC handles typing'
